Forgot PIN
Reset your
PIN.
👋 You are a Staff member.
Ask your Owner / Admin to reset your PIN.

They can do it from:
App → Settings → Manage Staff → Reset PIN
OR
Sends a request to support — they will help you reset your PIN.
🔐 Enter your 16-digit license key to verify you are the owner.
Find it in: Settings → Shop Info → License Key
OR
✓ Key Verified
